titles.title: What a Day That Will Be

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There is coming a day when no heartaches shall come, No more clouds in the sky, no more tears to dim the eye; All is peace forevermore on that happy golden shore, What a day, glorious day that will be.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: What a day that will be when my Jesus I shall see, And I look upon His face, the One who saved me by His grace; When He takes me by the hand, and leads me through the Promised Land, What a day, glorious day that will be.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: There’ll be no sorrow there, no more burdens to bear, No more sickness, no pain, no more parting over there; And forever I will be with the One who died for me, What a day, glorious day that will be.
